raw_text: manuel cuevas ezquerra c/leonor de la vega n5 6c 39300 torrelavega, cantabria, spain mcuevasez( gmail.com 1% october 2013 to whom it may concern, this september i finished my degree in industrial engineering and i am seeking a graduate job in the engineering sector. i am writing for a placement within your firm, as i understand that you may have appropriate vacancies available. as soon as i read your advertisement for direct entry graduate engineer i was very interested in it as it precisely fits my career plans. i have a strong interest in product design and development and i have always been admirer of your company as the biggest multinational in the sector. through my degree course, i have been able to develop my interest in different engineering areas. as a student i studied in depth in electricity, mechanics, fea, electronics and manufacturing. i have also got good computing skills (fortran and vlisp programming) and fluid mechanics. i achieved a high 2:1 during my degree, and i have also been rewarded with a sicue scholarship (interchange system between spanish universities), so i could move to the universidad politécnica de madrid for a year. for my final year of degree, i moved to portugal and choose to carry out a dissertation in inegi, in order to learn a new language and so i could experience a new environment with foreign partners. i spent 2011 summer working as a surf instructor, and 2012 summer experiencing a 4 month internship in insago pvc, learning about mechanical and electrical maintenance in a company with more than 150 employees. after i finished my studies, i started my internships in urbaser, being part of the operation team in an energy-from-waste facility for 3 months, and presently i am working as a project engineer in the slag valuation and management project. through these 7 months of internship i believe i have gained enough experience to help any company that would give me the opportunity to demonstrate my skills. i have cl level of english language (certificate in advanced english by the university of cambridge, may 2012) and b1 in portuguese learned during my 9 month stay in portugal. the reason i want to leave my current job respond to a strong desire to move to another country, as i am convinced that this fact would propel my career and would also improve my quality of life, since my partner is currently working in the uk . i feel i have a lot to offer, much potential and a great desire to learn, that fits your high standards i attach my cv to this covering letter, and also a recommendation letter from insago pvc. yours sincerely, manuel cuevas ezquerra personal information first name(s) / surname(s) address telephone(s) e-mail(s) date of birth gender education and
